message:
fix: replay ring buffer on first SSE connection, add integration tests

Broadcaster.Subscribe(0) was skipping catchup for first-time clients,
causing SESSION_START to be missed. After(0) returns all buffered items,
which is correct for new connections. Reconnecting clients with
Last-Event-ID=N still get After(N) correctly.

Add embedded server integration tests proving the full round-trip:
embedded startup → /status → POST /input → SSE events from LLM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
